title: Add Gmail and mobile number to Contact section

requirements.text: Add the Gmail address khushpal1011@gmail.com to the Contact section's contact information area. Display it as a clickable mailto: link alongside the existing phone number (+91 8527230903). Also ensure the mobile number +91 8527230903 is prominently displayed as a clickable tel: link in the contact info area (if not already present). Both pieces of contact info should be visible in the Contact section and in the Footer.

quotes: ad my gmail khushpal1011@gmail.com and mobile number+91 8527230903

acceptanceCriteria: The email address khushpal1011@gmail.com appears in the Contact section as an <a href='mailto:khushpal1011@gmail.com'> link.
The phone number +91 8527230903 appears in the Contact section as an <a href='tel:+918527230903'> link.
Both the email and phone number are also displayed in the Footer.
Clicking the email link opens the user's email client with khushpal1011@gmail.com as the recipient.
Clicking the phone link initiates a call to +91 8527230903 on supported devices.
Styling is consistent with the existing black and red theme.

constraints: Do not change the existing black and red visual theme.
Do not remove the existing phone number, working hours, or any other contact info already present.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding a contact form backend integration for email.
Any changes to services, pricing, or other sections.
Changing the site theme or layout.
